sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108293" key="u(podiaba/llw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποδια-βάλλω</orth>, <sense id="n108293.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slander somewhat,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:5:53" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.53</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
